name: Pressance Corporation
summary: Pressance Corporation engages in the real estate business in Japan. It is involved in the sale of newly-built condominiums; sale and brokerage of land; rental and management of buildings and apartments; management and operation of parking lots; and planning, consultation, and survey of other residential land and buildings. The company is also engaged in the hotel business. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan. As of January 14, 2021, Pressance Corporation operates as a subsidiary of Open House Co., Ltd.
